Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-3219 affecting package python-pip for versions less than 24.2-8
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-3219 affecting package python-pip for versions less than 24.2-8. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package python-pip is earlier than 24.2-8, affected by CVE-2026-3219
